title: Departure & Takeoff
description: Communicate with tower for takeoff clearance and initial departure instructions.

content.definition: ATC authorizes you to begin your takeoff roll on the assigned runway.
After takeoff, maintain the magnetic heading of the runway until further instructions.
content.example_atc: N172SP, fly runway heading, climb and maintain 3,000.

content.atc_text: N172SP, runway 28, cleared for takeoff, fly runway heading.
content.question: What heading should you fly after takeoff?
content.explanation: Runway 28 has a magnetic heading of approximately 280°. You fly that heading until ATC gives new instructions.

content.hint: Read back the runway and clearance, then your callsign.

content.prompt: N172SP, runway _____, cleared for _____, fly runway heading.
content.context: Tower is clearing you for takeoff on runway 28.

content.question: What frequency do you switch to?
content.explanation: ATC said contact departure on 119.1 — tune your radio to 119.1 MHz.

content.hint: Acknowledge by repeating the frequency and callsign.
